title: [podman-5.8] Only obtain a bear token once at a time.
body:
We missed getting #415 into the Podman 5.8 stream before the GA release. This will get it there in time for Podman v5.8.2
Once the vendor dance is completed, this will fix the following:

Fixes: https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-164030, https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-95964

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: checked the files and commits and looks like a clean backport. once ci is green LGTM
@mtrmac FWIW, I'm planning to vendor into Buildah, Podman, and Skopeo once the vendor dance is complete.
ACK, merge at will. (Do you also want a version bump?)
DOH!  I forgot the bloody version bump yet again.  I have added that.
